languages.text: {n}Техножрец начинает говорить после небольшой паузы.{/n} "Это утверждение верно — я приложил руку {g|Encyclopedia:Artisan}артизана{/g} ко многим машинам на данной платформе. Внесение изменений в священные схемы позволило увеличить производительность основных добывающих комплексов на сто пятьдесят три... поправка, сто пятьдесят четыре процента — значительно увеличить".

traits.locale_text: {n}Техножрец начинает говорить после небольшой паузы.{/n} "Это утверждение верно — я приложил руку {g|Encyclopedia:Artisan}артизана{/g} ко многим машинам на данной платформе. Внесение изменений в священные схемы позволило увеличить производительность основных добывающих комплексов на сто пятьдесят три... поправка, сто пятьдесят четыре процента — значительно увеличить".

languages.text: {n}After a brief pause, the Tech-Priest begins to speak:{/n} "This statement is true. I laid the {g|Encyclopedia:Artisan}Artisan{/g}'s hand upon many machines on this platform. The alterations to the sacred circuits have increased the productivity of the main mining units by one hundred and fifty-three... correction, one hundred and fifty-four percent — a considerable margin."

The alterations to the sacred circuits have increased the productivity of the main mining units by one hundred and fifty-three... correction, one hundred and fifty-four percent — a considerable margin."

languages.text: {n}短い沈黙の後、テクプリストが話し始める:{/n} 「説明です。聖なる回路の変更により、主要な採掘ユニットの生産性は153パーセント、修正すると154パーセント増加しました」
languages.original_text: {n}After a brief pause, the Tech-Priest begins to speak:{/n} "Explanation: it is. The alterations to the sacred circuits have increased the productivity of the main mining units by one hundred and fifty-three— correction, one hundred and fifty-four percent."

traits.locale_text: {n}短い沈黙の後、テクプリストが話し始める:{/n} 「説明です。聖なる回路の変更により、主要な採掘ユニットの生産性は153パーセント、修正すると154パーセント増加しました。」

languages.text: {n}Tekno Rahip, kısa bir duraklamadan sonra konuşmaya başlıyor.{/n} "İfade doğru.{g|Encyclopedia:Artisan} Zanaatkâr'ın{/g} elini, bu platformdaki birçok makineye değdirdim. Kutsal devrelerdeki değişiklikler, ana madencilik birimlerinin verimliliğini yüzde yüz elli üç... Düzeltme, yüzde yüz elli dört artırmış bulunuyor. Kayda değer bir oran."
languages.original_text: {n}After a brief pause, the Tech-Priest begins to speak:{/n} "This statement is true. I laid the {g|Encyclopedia:Artisan}Artisan{/g}'s hand upon many machines on this platform. The alterations to the sacred circuits have increased the productivity of the main mining units by one hundred and fifty-three... correction, one hundred and fifty-four percent — a considerable margin."

traits.locale_text: {n}Tekno Rahip, kısa bir duraklamadan sonra konuşmaya başlıyor.{/n} "İfade doğru.{g|Encyclopedia:Artisan} Zanaatkâr'ın{/g} elini, bu platformdaki birçok makineye değdirdim. Kutsal devrelerdeki değişiklikler, ana madencilik birimlerinin verimliliğini yüzde yüz elli üç... Düzeltme, yüzde yüz elli dört artırmış bulunuyor. Kayda değer bir oran."

languages.text: {n}Al cabo de una breve pausa, el tecnosacerdote empieza a hablar:{/n} «Esta declaración es verdadera. Apliqué la mano de {g|Encyclopedia:Artisan}artesano{/g} a numerosas máquinas en la plataforma. Las modificaciones a los circuitos sagrados han aumentado la productividad de las unidades principales de extracción en un ciento cincuenta y tres... corrección, ciento cincuenta y cuatro por ciento. Es un margen considerable».
languages.original_text: {n}After a brief pause, the Tech-Priest begins to speak:{/n} "This statement is true. I laid the {g|Encyclopedia:Artisan}Artisan{/g}'s hand upon many machines on this platform. The alterations to the sacred circuits have increased the productivity of the main mining units by one hundred and fifty-three... correction, one hundred and fifty-four percent — a considerable margin."

traits.locale_text: {n}Al cabo de una breve pausa, el tecnosacerdote empieza a hablar:{/n} «Esta declaración es verdadera. Apliqué la mano de {g|Encyclopedia:Artisan}artesano{/g} a numerosas máquinas en la plataforma. Las modificaciones a los circuitos sagrados han aumentado la productividad de las unidades principales de extracción en un ciento cincuenta y tres... corrección, ciento cincuenta y cuatro por ciento. Es un margen considerable».

languages.text: {n}短暂停顿后，技术神甫开始陈述：{/n}“此陈述为真。我曾亲手对该平台上的诸多机械施以‘{g|Encyclopedia:Artisan}匠人{/g}处理’。神圣回路的改动已使主要挖掘单位的生产效率提升了153%……修正：差值显著，应为154%。”
languages.original_text: {n}After a brief pause, the Tech-Priest begins to speak:{/n} "This statement is true. I laid the {g|Encyclopedia:Artisan}Artisan{/g}'s hand upon many machines on this platform. The alterations to the sacred circuits have increased the productivity of the main mining units by one hundred and fifty-three... correction, one hundred and fifty-four percent — a considerable margin."

traits.locale_text: {n}短暂停顿后，技术神甫开始陈述：{/n}“此陈述为真。我曾亲手对该平台上的诸多机械施以‘{g|Encyclopedia:Artisan}匠人{/g}处理’。神圣回路的改动已使主要挖掘单位的生产效率提升了153%……修正：差值显著，应为154%。”

languages.text: {n}Après quelques instants de silence, le technoprêtre reprend la parole :{/n} « Cette affirmation est exacte. J'ai placé ma main d'{g|Encyclopedia:Artisan}artisan{/g} sur bien des machines de cette plateforme. Grâce aux modifications apportées aux circuits sacrés, la productivité des unités d'extraction principales a augmenté de cent cinquante-trois... Rectification, cent cinquante-quatre pour cent... une marge considérable. »
languages.original_text: {n}After a brief pause, the Tech-Priest begins to speak:{/n} "This statement is true. I laid the {g|Encyclopedia:Artisan}Artisan{/g}'s hand upon many machines on this platform. The alterations to the sacred circuits have increased the productivity of the main mining units by one hundred and fifty-three... correction, one hundred and fifty-four percent — a considerable margin."

traits.locale_text: {n}Après quelques instants de silence, le technoprêtre reprend la parole :{/n} « Cette affirmation est exacte. J'ai placé ma main d'{g|Encyclopedia:Artisan}artisan{/g} sur bien des machines de cette plateforme. Grâce aux modifications apportées aux circuits sacrés, la productivité des unités d'extraction principales a augmenté de cent cinquante-trois... Rectification, cent cinquante-quatre pour cent... une marge considérable. »

languages.text: {n}Nach einer kurzen Pause ergreift der Techpriester das Wort:{/n} "Diese Aussage ist korrekt. Ich legte die Hand des {g|Encyclopedia:Artisan}Artifex{/g} auf viele Maschinen dieser Plattform. Die an den heiligen Schaltkreisen vorgenommenen Veränderungen haben die Produktivität der primären Mineneinheiten um hundertdreiundfünfzig ... Korrektur, hundertvierundfünfzig Prozent erhöht — ein beträchtlicher Wert."

The alterations to the sacred circuits have increased the productivity of the main mining units by one hundred and fifty-three... correction, one hundred and fifty-four percent — a considerable margin."
